corpus_manifest.membership: exact: every .smt2 file under the corpus root is manifested
corpus_manifest.name: glaurung-tcpip-shadow-splits-post-concat-fix-v1
corpus_manifest.source: Glaurung d60ed0f; Axeyum 4b81e4de; combined shadow, source-prefix direct lineage, 60 seconds per function; declared concat widths enforced; expected is the only backend-decided class

config.corpus_source: Glaurung d60ed0f; Axeyum 4b81e4de; combined shadow, source-prefix direct lineage, 60 seconds per function; declared concat widths enforced; expected is the only backend-decided class

determinism.corpus_order: stable manifest order (or deterministic lexical path order without a manifest)

experiment.comparison_contract: compare config_hash + environment_hash; source revision identifies the tested commit and may differ

per_rule.ablation_contract: pair this artifact by manifest path with --rewrite default --rewrite-disable-rule <id> to measure causal AIG/CNF/time deltas
per_rule.counting_unit: one affected instance per rule; instances firing multiple rules appear in each rule bucket

unsat_proof_replay.timing_accounting: nested within SAT solve time; not added again to cold total
